name: Police Crackdown
description: Heat rises across all your districts.

name: Bribe Pays Off
description: The cops look the other way. Heat -3 across all your districts.

name: Street Windfall
description: A deal falls in your lap. Gain $200.

name: Protection Racket
description: Pay up or face consequences. Lose $150.

name: Recruits Arrive
description: Fresh muscle shows up. Each owned district gains 1 thug.

name: Fed Raid
description: Feds descend on a random district you own.

name: Market Surge
description: Prices are hot this round. Dealing prices +25%.

name: Market Slump
description: Buyers dry up. Dealing prices -25% this round.

name: Black Market Contact
description: An anonymous tip scores you a free pusher.

name: Chemical Shipment
description: Labs are running hot. Production doubled this Dealing phase.
